verification_gate: Acceptance recomputes coverage from proofs, detects missing or conflicting outcomes, verifies rollback and provenance, and fails closed unless the sum equals the North Star.

recomputes_coverage_from_proofs.method: A child counts as PASS only when lifecycle_state==complete AND proof_records/<task_id>.proof.json exists; self-declared CSV coverage_status is never accepted.

north_star_anchors_recomputed.NS-CLARITY: 34/45 children passing, 10 draft + NBSOURCE-006 complete-without-proof -> unresolved

recomputes_coverage_from_proofs.high_level_phases_recomputed: 0/13 phases resolved (LIFEOS-000..LIFEOS-012 all Draft; LIFEOS-000..010 are the inputs-named phases, LIFEOS-011 is this phase, LIFEOS-012 follows)

anchor_proof_uris_missing: proof_records/LIFEOS-000.proof.json (cited by all 5 anchors; absent on disk)

detects_conflicting_outcomes.owner_conflict_on_durable_state: none (STORE-001 single-durable-writer invariant: PostgreSQL+RuVector owns every durable macro-state class exactly once)

detects_paper_completion.rule: self-declared 'covered-high-level' with decomposition 'owner-decision-pending' is paper completion and is downgraded to unresolved

verifies_rollback.release001_rollback_plan: Restore the archived acceptance plan and report; execution remains closed.
verifies_rollback.executed_rollback_evidence: LPS-025 lifecycle_state==rolled-back (rollback exercised, recorded in ledger)

verifies_provenance.adopted_capability_provenance: generated/adopted_capabilities.source.csv + generated/recovery_adoption_map.csv (source commit + PR + CI receipt per capability)

fails_closed_unless_sum_equals_north_sta.interpretation: Fail-closed is the correct acceptance behavior on a partial graph; the machinery refuses to certify release until the sum equals the North Star.

store_001_alignment.capability_loss_guard: Verified cutover: a class leaves redb-durable only after a green live blobstore_parity.rs run against a disposable PostgreSQL for that class; never by assumption.
store_001_alignment.single_writer_invariant: Single durable writer: PostgreSQL owns every durable macro-state class exactly once; redb never becomes a second durable writer for a PostgreSQL-owned class.

proof_summary: RELEASE-001 defines the machine-readable North Star system acceptance family and runs it once against the current graph. generated/north_star_acceptance_report.json recomputes coverage from the proof ledger (a child passes only when lifecycle_state==complete AND a proof record exists on disk, never from self-declared CSV coverage) for all five immutable North Star anchors and all thirteen high-level phase anchors (LIFEOS-000..LIFEOS-012): 0/5 anchors and 0/13 phases resolve, because every anchor still carries draft children (NS-EXTENSION 17/25, NS-WHOLE 20/31, NS-CLARITY 34/45, NS-DIRECTION 27/37, NS-PROGRESS 34/50) and every LIFEOS phase anchor is itself Draft. The detector enumerates real missing outcomes (the anchor proof_records/LIFEOS-000.proof.json cited by all five anchors is absent; NBSOURCE-006 and NBVERIFY-030 are complete without a proof record; 34 draft tasks lack proofs), finds zero true conflicts (the five NBVERIFY/STRUCTURE -v2 records are classified as revisions and LPS-025 as a clean terminal rollback), downgrades all five self-declared-covered anchors as paper completion, and confirms no owner conflict on durable state because STORE-001 fixes PostgreSQL+RuVector as the single canonical durable owner with redb transient-only. Rollback verification passes (196/196 tasks carry a rollback_plan, LPS-025 is executed-rollback evidence) and provenance passes (foundational blueprint + adoption provenance + proof_ledger and source_graph sha256 pins). The fail-closed aggregator evaluates sum_equals_north_star = false (0/5 anchors, 0/13 phases, missing anchor proof, owner execution closed, coverage gate closed) and returns acceptance_result 'fail-closed' with execution remaining closed. The task passes because the acceptance machinery is correctly defined and correctly fails closed on a partial graph; no product execution, schema deployment, or live-data write was performed.

live_commands.purpose: Recompute North Star + phase coverage from proofs, detect missing/conflicting/paper outcomes, verify rollback+provenance, and emit the fail-closed acceptance report
live_commands.command: python3 (acceptance recompute over task_graph.source.csv + north_star_coverage.source.csv + north_star_coverage.control.json + task_graph.status.json + proof_ledger.report.json + store_relationship_decision.json)
output: tasks_missing_rollback_plan= [] (196/196 present) owner_open= False gate_open= False sum_equals_north_star= False
